textByHashes.c90ef7175d8e8cb1a07f7cf053c097e0bee4cc64: I'm Gary, the wizard. I've not actually been qualified for very long, so I'm living here near the rune shop so I can keep practicing the magical arts.
textByHashes.8b47c2518da9f21786bb3d91940cb75afe24330b: I seem to be raising a cat, too, ever since some local lady persuaded me to buy one off her.
textByHashes.347e941fc5b3e2efb99f0dd40facc829aefa08d6: No! I know there are places where people think it's normal to swap cats for runes, but that will NOT happen to Sookie!
textByHashes.66b88a521857c6f5e8267b1089cc0e99523617a2: Always! But I'm not looking for any assistance from passing adventurers, if that's what you were thinking. Maybe another time.
textByHashes.08368b060888afff5b225cc6d67fc29bae62ea49: Thank you so much for helping me open the Realm of Memories, !
textByHashes.9c18f80182e8715f44b4b219f2470a042275dbcb: I'm a qualified wizard now, thanks to you. So I've settled here, near a handy rune shop, so I can keep practicing the magical arts while I raise this cat that some local lady persuaded me to buy.
textByHashes.6fd7061c8dab1607e26da85bc7f86b2eb2ef8bc1: Maybe I'll need your help with another project in future, but for now, I think I'm okay.
textByHashes.3e5d45e5e6d6210f499e351529a61358c36745d8: The mementos expired, so no. I'm not really interested in repeating that project, anyway - I prefer my work to bring fresh challenges, rather than just recycling copies of stuff I did before.
